list.title: Mappings
list.description: Mappings that normalize events from your integrations into the standard format (OCSF).
list.searchPlaceholder: Search by vendor, type or description...

emptyFiltered.title: No mapping found with the applied filters.
emptyFiltered.description: Adjust the search or the vendor/event type filters, or clear them to see all mappings.

emptyNoActive.title: No mappings for active integrations
emptyNoActive.description: Default mappings appear here as soon as you connect an integration. Connect one in Integrations, or view all available mappings.

prefillBanner.before: Adding a rule for the field
prefillBanner.after: detected in drift. Fill in the

discardConfirm.title: Discard changes?
discardConfirm.description: All unsaved changes will be lost. This action cannot be undone.

reservoir.title: Reservoir samples unavailable
reservoir.description: Automatic sample loading will be available soon. For now, use Manual mode to paste an event JSON and preview the simulation.

manual.hint: Paste a valid JSON object to see the normalized envelope in the right-hand panel.

errors.notObject: The payload must be a JSON object (key/value).

rulesEditor.heading: Rules
rulesEditor.importAriaLabel: Import rules from a JSON file

importConfirm.title: Confirm import
importConfirm.replaceCurrent_one: This will replace the {{count}} current rule
importConfirm.replaceCurrent_other: This will replace the {{count}} current rules
importConfirm.withImported_one: with {{count}} imported rule. This action cannot be undone.
importConfirm.withImported_other: with {{count}} imported rules. This action cannot be undone.

rulesEditor.searchAriaLabel: Search rule by target or source
rulesEditor.emptyEditHint: No rules yet. Click "Add rule" to get started.

emptyView.title: No rules defined
emptyView.description: This version has no mapping rules.

rulesEditor.noFilterResults: No rules found with the applied filters.

addMenu.arrayBuilderHint: Builds an array of OCSF observables

removeConfirm.title: Remove rule?
removeConfirm.after: will be removed from this mapping. This action cannot be undone.

placeholders.default: default value if source is missing

sourceType.label: Source type
sourceType.description: Choose how the value is obtained: extracted from the vendor payload (JMESPath) or a fixed value (constant).

target.description: Path in the normalized envelope where the value goes. Use dot-path notation.

source.description: JMESPath expression applied to the vendor's raw payload to extract the value. Supports nested paths, filters and functions.

const.description: Constant value assigned to the target, regardless of the vendor payload. Useful for fixed metadata like the product name.

default.description: Value used if the source does not exist or resolves to null. Without a default, the field is left absent.

typeCast.description: Transformation applied AFTER source and value_map. Examples: iso_to_epoch converts ISO 8601 to epoch ms; to_int/to_str/to_bool perform type coercion.

valueMap.description: JSON map {original_value: mapped_value} applied AFTER the source. Useful for converting severity strings into OCSF codes.

required.description: If checked and the value is null/absent after all transformations, the event goes to quarantine instead of being sent to the SIEM.

intentionalDefault.label: Intentional default value (don't alert in simulation)
intentionalDefault.description: Check this when the rule is an expected placeholder that always falls back to default — e.g. a required OCSF field we don't have from the vendor yet.

whenCondition.label: Condition (when)
whenCondition.description: Optional predicate: if it evaluates to false, the rule is entirely skipped — the target is not written. Unlike default: the field is left absent from the output.

arrayBuilder.dedupByHint: List of observable fields, e.g.: "value" or "value,type"
arrayBuilder.skipNullAriaLabel: skip_null — omit observables with null source

columns.explodeTitle: If true and source resolves to a list, generates 1 observable per element
columns.skipNullTitle: Indeterminate = inherits from the rule level

arrayBuilder.emptyItems: No items yet. Click "+ Add item" to get started.

whenBuilder.maxDepthReached: Maximum depth reached. Simplify the condition.
whenBuilder.sourceEmptyWarning: Source cannot be empty. The predicate will be rejected by the backend.
whenBuilder.inValuesHint: One value per line. Numbers are detected automatically.

exists.label: exists — field exists in the payload
exists.description: True if the JMESPath resolves to any non-null value (including empty lists and objects).

equals.label: equals — value equals (type-strict)
equals.description: True if the field's value exactly matches the given literal. Type-strict comparison: 3 ≠ "3".

in.label: in — value is in the list (type-strict)
in.description: True if the field's value is in the list. One value per line. Numbers are parsed automatically.

not.label: not — negates a sub-condition
not.description: Negates the sub-condition. Useful for expressing "field does not exist" or "value is not X".

preprocessEditor.heading: Preprocessing
preprocessEditor.emptyState: No operations. Click "+ Add preprocessing" to get started.

preprocessRow.tolerantAriaLabel: tolerant — continue even if parsing fails

dryRunStatusBar.warningsChipAriaLabel_one: {{count}} rule with 100% fallback to default — click for details
dryRunStatusBar.warningsChipAriaLabel_other: {{count}} rules with 100% fallback to default — click for details

defaultHitWarnings.title: Rules with 100% fallback to default
defaultHitWarnings.description: These rules have their source resolving to null in 100% of samples. Check whether the JMESPath is correct, or mark it as intentional if it's an expected placeholder.

empty.title: Provide a sample to see the normalization.
empty.description: Paste a JSON in the Payload panel (Manual mode) or wait for the reservoir integration.

templatePicker.title: Load OCSF template
templatePicker.heading: Select an OCSF template to pre-fill the required rules

confirmReplace.after: will replace all current rules. This action cannot be undone.

saveModal.title: Save new version
saveModal.commitTooShort: The message must be at least {{min}} characters long.

highFailRate.title: High failure rate in the simulation
highFailRate.description: More than 50% of the samples fail with these rules. Consider reviewing before saving.

saveModal.noChanges: No changes compared to the current version.
saveModal.commitMessagePlaceholder: Describe what changed in this version...

rollback.messageTooShort: The message must be at least 10 characters long.
rollback.confirmDescription: This action will promote v{{version}} to the current version of the mapping. Existing versions will not be deleted.

diffModal.title: Version diff
diffModal.reorderedOnlyDescription: No rule changed — the rules were only reordered.
